ab: pitu’ cak tuki’ haip kahan kaku’.
en: I arrived at school at seven today.

ab: kitnga’in, minsumin na sinsi’, tupa ka lavivi’an tu “mindangkaza! masumsum!”
ch: 上課了，老師來了，班長說:「起立!敬禮!」
en: It’s time for class , the teacher walked into the classroom, and the monitor said: “Stand up! Salute!”

ab: kinga’in isnava’an, isnava’an cam sinsi’ malasbunun masipul sipulun.
ch: 上課的時候，老師教我們數字的族語。
en: In class, the teacher taught us the Bunun language of numbers.

ab: sisili cam sinsi’ masipul, tusauc cam sipulun tu sintusauc.
ch: 我們跟著老師唸，我們唱了數字歌。
en: We followed the teacher to read, we sang the number song.
I have learned many Bunun languages.

ab: daqdaqqanin cak munkaku’, daqdaqqanin cak pinanam malasbunun, patan’a zaku tina nak.
ch: 我天天去學校，我天天學族語，我要講給媽媽聽。
en: I go to school every day, I learn the Bunun language every day, and I want to tell my mother.
